name: Dumpling Squishy Mystery Box, Random 1 of 14 Colors, Cute Squishy Dumpling Toy, Soft Stretchy Squeeze Toy, Sensory Fidget Toys for Anxiety Relief, Perfect for Party Favors, Birthday Gifts & Desk Toys
bullets: 【Dumpling Squishy Mystery Box Surprise -Random 1 of 14 Colors】 Unbox pure joy with this blind box. Each dumpling squishy reveals one Surprise. Vibrant steamed-dumpling-inspired colors with a cute smile, including shining dumpling model. Perfect as a desk toy or blind box gift. Get ready to collect the amazing surprises!

【Soft & Safe TPR Material, Slow Rising Squishy】 Made from non-toxic TPR, this squishy is soft, durable, and eco-friendly. The slow rising texture delivers wonderful sensory satisafaction feeling. It is easy to clean with water—just rinse and air dry.

【Perfect Size & Durable for Long Time Play】 Designed with an easy-to-grip size with 3.93*3.93*1.96inch, it fits comfortably in any hand. Made from tear-resistant material, it keeps its shape through endless squeezing, pinching, and pressing and ensure long time play fun.

【Focus & Calm - For Work, Study & Daily Breaks】 More than a cute collectible, it doubles as a stress relief tool. Keep it on your desk to improve focus during meetings or study, so it is especially ideal for students and office workers.

【Perfect Gift for All Ages & Occasions】 Packaged in a decorative bamboo-style steamer box, it's a memorable gift for birthdays or Children's Day. Great for party favors, classroom rewards, or office fun.

reviews.name: VALEZKA SALCEDO
reviews.title: Great Sensory Toy for Kids!
reviews.body: I bought this mystery slime dim sum toy for my son, and he absolutely loves it! The surprise element makes it exciting, and the slime is soft, stretchy, and fun to play with. The cute designs and bright colors are very appealing to children.It has been a great sensory toy that keeps him entertained for hours and helps him stay calm and focused. The packaging is adorable, and the quality is better…

reviews.name: Maria Karla Ricardo
reviews.title: So Cute and Surprisingly Stress Relieving!
reviews.body: I absolutely love this little dumpling stress ball! It’s incredibly soft, squishy, and has the cutest little face that instantly makes me smile. The texture is smooth and satisfying to squeeze, making it perfect for relieving stress or keeping my hands busy while working or watching TV.The material feels durable, and it always returns to its original shape after squeezing. It also comes in a cute…

reviews.name: Geidy Lombillo
reviews.title: Caja misteriosa blanda
reviews.body: I absolutely love this squishy mystery box! The dumpling design is adorable, and the surprise element makes it even more fun to open. The squishy is super soft, stretchy, and very satisfying to squeeze. It’s great for stress relief, fidgeting, or simply collecting the different colors. The quality feels nice, and the cute little face adds so much charm. This would make a wonderful gift for kids…

reviews.name: Yitsy Fernández
reviews.title: I would compare it again... very satisfying, adorable
reviews.body: I loved this soft toy. It has a very soft and pleasant texture, and slowly returns to its original shape after squeezing it, which is very relaxing and fun.The design is beautifully made, with vivid colours and a good quality finish. The presentation in the dim sum steamer box gives it a very original detail that makes it perfect for gift giving.I think it offers excellent value for money. It's…
